ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the match was played in */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the match belongs to */,
  "league" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "team1" TEXT /* Name of the first team */,
  "team2" TEXT /* Name of the second team */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "xg1" REAL /* Expected goals scored by the first team */,
  "xg2" REAL /* Expected goals scored by the second team */,
  "nsxg1" REAL /* Non-shot expected goals scored by the first team */,
  "nsxg2" REAL /* Non-shot expected goals scored by the second team */,
  "adj_score1" REAL /* Adjusted score of the first team */,
  "adj_score2" REAL /* Adjusted score of the second team */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of the match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "assistant_referee1" TEXT /* Name of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee2" TEXT /* Name of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official" TEXT /* Name of the fourth official */,
  "match_report" TEXT /* Detailed report of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the stat belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the stat belongs to */,
  "spi" REAL /* Soccer Power Index (SPI) rating */,
  "prob" REAL /* Probability of winning */,
  "importance" REAL /* Importance of the match */,
  "possession" REAL /* Possession percentage */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "pass_completion" REAL /* Pass completion percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the stat belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stat belongs to */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  " dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_stats" (
  "coach_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach stat */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the stat belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach the stat belongs to */,
  "tactics" TEXT /* Tactics used by the coach */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Formation used by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_stats_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the report belongs to */,
  "report" TEXT /* Detailed report of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_reports_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the version belongs to */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the data belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
